code:
import io
import string

fn abs_of(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut have_min = false
  mut min_val = 0

  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = false
    mut cur_byte = 0
    if i == n
      is_ws = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      cur_byte = b
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    end

    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if not have_min
            min_val = v
            have_min = true
          else if abs_of(v) < abs_of(min_val)
            min_val = v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(cur_byte)}"
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println("min_abs=#{min_val}")
end
